title: Train v5 model with scale_pos_weight + deploy
problem: VPS runs v2 model without scale_pos_weight. Need to backfill latest trade_outcomes, train v5 with scale_pos_weight (no calibration), and deploy if better than v2.

title: Backtest optimal risk-scaling thresholds
problem: Current thresholds (0.50 full size, 0.85 skip) chosen by intuition. Should backtest different threshold pairs on historical data to find optimal win rate / participation trade-off.

title: Per-account max spread for XAUUSDm (Standard)
problem: Account A uses XAUUSDm (Standard account) which has wider spread than XAUUSD (Pro/Raw). Currently SCALP_SPREAD_MAX=30 blocks account A while B/C pass. Need per-account max spread config (e.g. A=40, B/C=30).

title: ML filter health check — detect silent crashes
problem: ML filter crashed silently on VPS (missing get_risk_multiplier method) and swing trader continued opening trades without ML protection for days. Need a health check that verifies the ML filter actually works (runs a test prediction and validates output), not just checks if models loaded. If ML filter fails >N consecutive times, circuit break: stop trading.
solution: Added health_check() to TradeOutcomePredictor, ML circuit breaker (5 consecutive failures = stop trading), try/except around all ML filter calls in 3 traders

title: ML retrain v3 for D1 bearish regime
problem: v2.best models trained mostly on bullish D1 period → P(LOSS) artificially high (>85%) for SELL even after D1 flips bearish. Need regime-aware retraining: separate models or features for bullish vs bearish D1, or retrain with recent data that includes the current bearish period. Without this, ML continues blocking SELL in the correct direction.
solution: Fixed by v4 model with backtest-to-ML pipeline generating 1,004 bearish synthetic trades

title: Add trend flip Telegram alerts
problem: When D1 or H4 trend flips direction (bullish→bearish or vice versa), there's no notification. The system's trading behavior changes dramatically (e.g. BUY-only → SELL-allowed) without anyone knowing. Add Telegram notification via metty/notify/ when D1 EMA50/200 or H4 EMA10/50 crosses direction.

title: Validate features_json structure after backfill
problem: backfill_trade_outcomes() strips metadata keys from features_json without any validation that critical ML features (d1_trend, h4_trend) are preserved. Need a test that asserts expected keys exist in features_json after backfill to prevent silent data loss.

title: Remove duplicate functions in metty/core/db.py
problem: backfill_trade_outcomes() and query_trade_outcomes_for_training() both have duplicate copies in db.py (lines 516-650 and 929-1063). Python uses the second definition, but the duplication is confusing and error-prone.
solution: Removed first copies of backfill_trade_outcomes (lines 633-778) and query_trade_outcomes_for_training (lines 779-820). Python uses the last definition, so kept versions with MFE/MAE support are correct.

title: Pre-deploy syntax + import verification
problem: No automated safety net before deploy: syntax check and import chain test are manual steps that get skipped when session compacts. Deployed code with syntax errors (broken @strategy decorator) because verification was missed. Need mandatory pre-deploy script that runs py_compile + import test on all modified Python files.
solution: Created scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh + scripts/pre_deploy_checks.py for syntax, import, SQL placeholder, and scope verification before deploy

title: No integration test for insert_live_trade()
problem: INSERT INTO live_trades had 30 columns but only 29 values. This was a production-only bug because dry-run path doesn't exercise DB writes. Need a test that verifies all columns are populated correctly.
solution: Added tests/test_db_inserts.py with 5 tests: all-columns insert, minimal insert, close with MFE/MAE, rejected signal, SQL column integrity

title: Scope verification for variable reference changes
problem: Changed self._last_h4_trend to h4_trend but h4_trend was only defined in _generate_signal(), not run_once(). Need a pre-commit check or code review step that traces variable scope after find-and-replace fixes.
solution: Pre-deploy scope check now verifies h4_trend, d1_trend, session, regime are defined in run_once()

title: Deploy ML v3 model when bearish data sufficient
problem: v3 model trained but not deployed (direction_SELL dropped from 65.9% to 54.3%). Need 50+ bearish trades before v3 can outperform v2. Currently only 1 bearish trade in dataset.
solution: Deployed v4 model instead (supersedes v3). 10 sub-models including volatile regime.
notes: v3 model in data/models/trade_outcome_v3/. Backfill script at scripts/backfill_trend_features.py. Blocked on market data.

title: Deploy verification missing model loading check
problem: VPS deploy showed 'healthy' but models were silently failing to load (sklearn _loss module error). Had to manually check logs to discover the issue. Deploy script should verify model loading as a smoke test.
solution: Created scripts/smoke-test-ml.py with 5 checks: sklearn version compatibility, model directory + files, TradeOutcomePredictor loading, health_check() prediction test, regime x direction prediction pipeline. Integrated into deploy-vps.sh (start/rebuild actions run it after container start) and pre-deploy-check.sh (step 5).

title: Column casing inconsistency across pipeline
problem: load_timeframe() returns Title Case, compute_features_from_candles() expects lowercase, BacktestEngine.run() expects Title Case. Causes KeyError bugs when new code assumes wrong case. Should standardize to one convention.

title: Volatile regime training data still sparse
problem: Even with threshold lowered to 0.035, only 154 volatile samples. Model accuracy 74.2% but PF 1.50 is marginal. Need more data or augmentation for volatile regime to be reliable.

title: ML metadata NULL for 2,364 pre-fix trades
problem: ml_loss_proba and ml_model_used were always NULL before the bug fix. 2,364 trades lack ML metadata. Cannot retrain ML model on these trades' ML predictions.
solution: Historical trades cannot be retroactively filled. Only new trades from fix onward have ML data. Will accumulate naturally over time.
notes: Found in retro 2026-06-05. Historical trades can't be retroactively filled — only new trades from fix onward have data. Wait for 50+ new trades with ML data.

title: No automated data integrity check for trading params
problem: trade_outcomes rows can have NULL atr_multiplier/rr_ratio/min_confidence_threshold without any check. Data integrity relies on manual backfill instead of automated verification.
notes: Found in retro 2026-06-07. 10,167 rows had NULL params after schema migration.

title: Type inconsistency: get_connection only accepted Path, not str
problem: get_connection() had signature Optional[Path] but callers passed strings from CLI, causing AttributeError on .parent. Fixed but similar type mismatches may exist elsewhere.
solution: Fixed in commit 1e0f817 - get_connection() now accepts both Path and str
notes: Found in retro 2026-06-07. Fixed in commit 1e0f817.

title: Ad-hoc SQL migrations on production DB without rollback or audit
problem: Data migrations on VPS are done via direct SQL over SSH with no migration scripts, no rollback capability, and no audit trail. One wrong UPDATE could corrupt 10K+ rows.
notes: Found in retro 2026-06-07. Need migration framework for DB schema changes.
